summary: A messaging application where users can send and receive messages. The UI includes timestamps for when messages are sent and received, and a reply button on every message.

existing_features.title: Display a timestamp on every message bubble in ConversationView showing when the message was sent or received. The timestamp should be formatted in a human-readable way (e.g., '2:45 PM' for today's messages, or 'Mon 2:45 PM' for older messages) and positioned below each message bubble.

Add a Reply button to every message bubble in ConversationView. When clicked, it should populate the message input field with a quoted preview of the original message (e.g., prepend '> [original message text]\n' to the input) and focus the input so the user can type their reply.

Ensure the message data model used in ConversationView exposes a timestamp field (createdAt or similar) from the backend so it can be rendered in the frontend. If the existing Message type already returns a timestamp, confirm it is passed through to the ConversationView component and each message bubble.

new_feature_requests.summary: Show timestamps for when messages are sent and received
Add a reply button to every message
